name: Sigurd Raschèr
abstract: Sigurd Manfred Raschèr (15 May 1907 – 25 February 2001) was an American saxophonist born in Germany. He became an important figure in the development of the 20th century repertoire for the classical saxophone.

concerts.label: New York Philharmonic Young People's Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Kidd Jordan
about_quotes.evidence: I had a set of fingerings that worked for me when I was in high school with all of that. I just worked them out.
